channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Your OnePlus update is on hold, and honestly, you should be glad
item.description: OnePlus has pulled its latest OxygenOS update after boot loop issues hit some phones.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Some new lockscreen customization options in OxygenOS 15 on a OnePlus 12
media:content.media:text: Some new lockscreen customization options in OxygenOS 15 on a OnePlus 12
media:content.media:title: Some new lockscreen customization options in OxygenOS 15 on a OnePlus 12

item.title: Ahead of Memorial Day Weekend, this pricey Samsung TV just scored a $1,300 PRICE DROP at Best Buy
item.description: This 77-inch Samsung Smart Tizen TV normally sells at $3,500.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: a samsung-brand tv
media:content.media:text: a samsung-brand tv
media:content.media:title: a samsung-brand tv

item.title: This thin magnetic plate from Rolling Square is nearly invisible and can mount phones and tablets to screens
item.description: The Rolling Square Edge Pro Core is a one-of-a-kind magnetic metal mount that's unbelievably thin, yet insanely hardy. It can prop up tablets and phones alike.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Rolling Square Edge Pro Core magnetic mount
media:content.media:text: Rolling Square Edge Pro Core magnetic mount
media:content.media:title: Rolling Square Edge Pro Core magnetic mount

item.title: The Motorola Razr Fold's displays are better than Google's or Samsung's, and these unique settings are its ace in the hole
item.description: Motorola switched from pOLED to Extreme AMOLED panels on the Razr Fold, but the company isn't letting its great eye care solutions fall to the wayside.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The lockscreen on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:text: The lockscreen on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:title: The lockscreen on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026

item.title: Unlock the Razr Fold 2026's true multitasking power with these hidden features
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold is a brilliant phone with plenty of power to spare, but a few quick settings changes will unlock its true power.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Using multiple apps at a time on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:text: Using multiple apps at a time on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:title: Using multiple apps at a time on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026

item.title: Google I/O 2026 Live Blog: Android 17, Android XR glasses, and all the Gemini AI news
item.description: Google I/O is happening on May 19 and Android Central is following everything that is going to be announced. Follow our Live Blog to learn about all the news!
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Google IO 2026 live blog
media:content.media:text: Google IO 2026 live blog
media:content.media:title: Google IO 2026 live blog

item.title: 6 reasons to buy the Motorola Razr Fold and 3 reasons to skip it
item.description: We weigh the pros and cons of buying the new Motorola Razr Fold, which is finally available for preorder and goes on sale next week.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Fold on a table
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Fold on a table
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Fold on a table

item.title: Act fast! These Beats noise-cancelling earbuds are now 41% OFF at Amazon — but not for long
item.description: The Beats Studio Buds Plus are a capable pair of noise-cancelling earbuds.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: A person with an earbud in their ear
media:content.media:text: A person with an earbud in their ear
media:content.media:title: A person with an earbud in their ear

item.title: The Motorola Razr Fold cameras are so powerful, you could use it to spot Jack and Rose on the Titanic from New York
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold 2026 does what no other Motorola phone before it could, and that all starts with a class-leading camera.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The back of the unfolded white Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:text: The back of the unfolded white Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:title: The back of the unfolded white Motorola Razr Fold 2026

item.title: Is the Motorola Razr Fold waterproof?
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold is the first of its kind for the company, and Motorola has left no stone unturned in terms of specs and features.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Fold on the corner of a table
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Fold on the corner of a table
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Fold on the corner of a table

item.title: Now Brief on Galaxy might make sure your priorities never go unread in One UI 9
item.description: One UI 9 is allegedly working on an important update for Galaxy's Now Brief, potentially making it highlight "priority" alerts you've missed.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Now Brief settings on the Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Now Brief settings on the Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Now Brief settings on the Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 vs. Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro: A battle of brilliant features and sound
item.description: Sony's WF-1000XM6 vs. Samsung's Galaxy Buds 4 Pro is a story of small differences that make a big deal!
item.author: klpmediallc@gmail.com (Tshaka Armstrong)
item.dc:creator: Tshaka Armstrong

media:content.media:description: Sony WF-1000XM6 next to Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro
media:content.media:text: Sony WF-1000XM6 next to Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro

item.title: Meta's Ray-Ban Display build for the future, opens its doors to developers
item.description: Meta revealed that it will deliver a Developer Preview and access for developers to begin creating mobile and web apps for the Ray-Ban Display.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Photo of the Meta Ray-Ban Display smart glasses on display.
media:content.media:text: Photo of the Meta Ray-Ban Display smart glasses on display.
media:content.media:title: Photo of the Meta Ray-Ban Display smart glasses on display.

item.title: ROG Xreal R1 are here, and these gaming AR glasses sound like a dream
item.description: The ROG Xreal R1 AR gaming glasses launched, and details highlight its strong focus on gaming.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Asus ROG and Xreal gaming glasses in a press render.
media:content.media:text: The Asus ROG and Xreal gaming glasses in a press render.
media:content.media:title: The Asus ROG and Xreal gaming glasses in a press render.

item.title: Does the Motorola Razr Fold support Qi2 wireless charging?
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold is the company's first book-style foldable and it boasts of impressive specs and is pledged to get seven years of OS upgrades.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

media:content.media:title: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

item.title: Does the Motorola Razr 2026 support Qi2 wireless charging?
item.description: The Motorola Razr 2026 series of devices have substantial powerpacks with fast wired and wireless charging. However, native Qi2 support isn't there.
item.author: sharmarajat@zoho.com (Rajat Sharma)
item.dc:creator: Rajat Sharma

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, Razr Plus 2026, and Razr 2026

item.title: Ditch your old phone with the 44% OFF the the Google Pixel 9 — or its biggest price drop yet
item.description: The clock is ticking on this deal, though.

item.title: Netflix is about to flood its app with more ads, so brace yourself
item.description: Netflix stated that viewers should prepare for even more ads, as the company seeks to really drive home the revenue.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: A 'Home Display' appeared in Google's code, and the timing could be significant
item.description: We're really looking forward to I/O now, after a rumor allegedly spotted a "Google Home Display" in the company's code.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Garmin's Whoop rival just leaked, and it might be five times the price of the Fitbit Air
item.description: Garmin's screenless wearable could cost around $509, far above the Fitbit Air and even higher than Whoop.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: A pair of smart glasses turns your Razr Fold into a full-fledged laptop
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold has a powerful computer mode you probably don't know about, and all you need to make it complete is a pair of smart glasses.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: Google just turned your Pixel 10 into a phone that thinks ahead for you
item.description: Google’s new Android feature wants to predict your next move with on-device AI, making phones smarter, more proactive, and maybe just a little too nosy.

item.title: Google may be cutting free Gmail storage for new accounts down to 5GB
item.description: Google may reduce free Gmail storage for new accounts from 15GB to 5GB.

item.title: I've tested the Motorola Razr Fold for two weeks, and Samsung has a new reason to be nervous

item.title: This simple Google Search trick gets rid of all the AI slop
item.description: Google Search has a lot of unnecessary AI features and bloat cluttering up the actual search results, but there's an easy way to get around all of that. With Google Search Web mode, you get ten blue links to every query, just like it used to be.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Google Search Web mode on a Find X9 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Google Search Web mode on a Find X9 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Google Search Web mode on a Find X9 Ultra

item.title: Galaxy S24 user endures a nightmare, phone goes up in flames during use
item.description: A Galaxy S24 user reported that their phone went up in flames while they were using it, and Samsung has responded.

item.title: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide sounds great until you look at the cameras
item.description: Samsung’s Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide may finally fix the Fold’s awkward narrow screen, but ditching the zoom camera could make it feel less flagship.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.

item.title: The OnePlus 15R is a battery life beast, and it just scored a record-smashing discount at Amazon
item.description: Amazon is slashing a straight $100 off the OnePlus 15R, knocking the price of the 512GB phone down to its lowest price ever recorded.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)

item.title: I’ve waited years for Apple to fix iPhone-to-Android texting, and it’s finally happening

item.title: The Vivo X300 FE is a standout compact flagship — there's just one issue

item.title: Android Auto gets a fresh take on Google Maps navigation, teases more Gemini at the Android Show
item.description: The Android Show 2026 revealed Google's major personal and AI-fueled plans for Android Auto, giving drivers a refined hands-free experience.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google maps receives a visual update for Android Auto, introducing "Immersive Navigation" for a more robust 3D view of the world around your car.
media:content.media:text: Google maps receives a visual update for Android Auto, introducing "Immersive Navigation" for a more robust 3D view of the world around your car.
media:content.media:title: Google maps receives a visual update for Android Auto, introducing "Immersive Navigation" for a more robust 3D view of the world around your car.
